MINI MINUTES: Judge Ksenia Tsenin Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Ming Fai Kwan is present.
Attorney Robert Yee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Erik E. Andrade is present.
Attorney Kevin Frankel representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of AUG-06-2012 is vacated.
